vocabulary.english: Lost / Confused / At a loss / Bewildered

options: Lost / Confused / At a loss / Bewildered

mini_exercises.question: Which word means 'Lost / Confused / At a loss / Bewildered'?

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Introverted / Shy / Reserved

mini_exercises.question_pinyin: 他虽然___，但在成长过程中慢慢变得更加成熟，也更懂得珍惜回忆。
mini_exercises.question_english: Although he is introverted, he gradually became more mature through growing up and learned to cherish his memories.

vocabulary.example: 外向的少年总是充满活力，善于珍惜每一次与朋友在一起的机会。
vocabulary.translation: Outgoing youngsters are always full of energy and good at cherishing every opportunity to be with friends.
vocabulary.example_pinyin: wài xiàng de shào nián zǒng shì chōng mǎn huó lì shàn yú zhēn xī měi yī cì yǔ péng yǒu zài yì qǐ de jī huì

mini_exercises.question: Fill in: Extroverted / Outgoing / Sociable

key_sentences.chinese: 随着时间的推移，我们慢慢从青春走向成熟。
key_sentences.pinyin: Suí zhe shí jiān de tuī yí, wǒ men màn màn cóng qīng chūn zǒu xiàng chéng shú.
key_sentences.english: As time goes by, we gradually move from youth towards maturity.

key_sentences.chinese: 他曾经经历了很多困难，但这些经历让他变得更加坚强。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā céng jīng jīng lì le hěn duō kùn nán, dàn zhè xiē jīng lì ràng tā biàn de gèng jiā jiān qiáng.
key_sentences.english: He once went through many difficulties, but those experiences made him stronger.

key_sentences.chinese: 趁年轻，要好好规划自己的未来，珍惜每一个机会。
key_sentences.pinyin: Chèn nián qīng, yào hǎo hǎo guī huà zì jǐ de wèi lái, zhēn xī měi yí gè jī huì.
key_sentences.english: While you are young, plan your future well and cherish every opportunity.

key_sentences.chinese: 童年的回忆是人生中最珍贵的财富之一。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tóng nián de huí yì shì rén shēng zhōng zuì zhēn guì de cái fù zhī yī.
key_sentences.english: Childhood memories are among the most precious treasures in one's life.

key_sentences.chinese: 随着时间的推移，曾经的烦恼都会慢慢变成宝贵的成长经历。
key_sentences.pinyin: Suí zhe shí jiān de tuī yí, céng jīng de fán nǎo dōu huì màn màn biàn chéng bǎo guì de chéng zhǎng jīng lì.
key_sentences.english: As time goes by, the worries of the past will gradually become precious growing-up experiences.

key_sentences.chinese: 趁现在还有时间，好好陪伴家人，不要留下遗憾。
key_sentences.pinyin: Chèn xiàn zài hái yǒu shí jiān, hǎo hǎo péi bàn jiā rén, bú yào liú xià yí hàn.
key_sentences.english: While there is still time now, spend quality time with family and don't leave regrets.

key_sentences.chinese: 童年和青春是人生中最美好的阶段，需要珍惜。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tóng nián hé qīng chūn shì rén shēng zhōng zuì měi hǎo de jiē duàn, xū yào zhēn xī.
key_sentences.english: Childhood and youth are the most beautiful stages in life and should be cherished.

key_sentences.chinese: 她回忆起成长的经历，感到每一个人生阶段都有价值。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā huí yì qǐ chéng zhǎng de jīng lì, gǎn dào měi yī gè rén shēng jiē duàn dōu yǒu jià zhí.
key_sentences.english: She recalled her growing-up experiences, feeling that every life stage has value.

key_sentences.chinese: 珍惜机会、把握未来是每个人在成长过程中应该学会的道理。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhēn xī jī huì, bǎ wò wèi lái shì měi gè rén zài chéng zhǎng guò chéng zhōng yīng gāi xué huì de dào lǐ.
key_sentences.english: Cherishing opportunities and seizing the future is a lesson everyone should learn during their growth.

grammar_points.title: 随着时间的推移 — As time goes by
grammar_points.explanation: 随着时间的推移 is a set phrase meaning 'as time passes' or 'as time goes by'. It is used to indicate that something changes gradually over time. Structure: 随着时间的推移, + (subject) + change/result. It can also be shortened to 随着时间 in more informal writing. 随着时间的推移，他越来越成熟了 - As time went by, he became more and more mature.

examples.chinese: 随着时间的推移，童年的记忆渐渐变得模糊了。
examples.pinyin: Suí zhe shí jiān de tuī yí, tóng nián de jì yì jiàn jiàn biàn de mó hu le.
examples.english: As time went by, childhood memories gradually became hazy.

examples.chinese: 随着时间的推移，他曾经的遗憾都转化成了人生的宝贵经历。
examples.pinyin: Suí zhe shí jiān de tuī yí, tā céng jīng de yí hàn dōu zhuǎn huà chéng le rén shēng de bǎo guì jīng lì.
examples.english: As time went by, his former regrets were transformed into precious life experiences.

exercises.question: _____ ，他慢慢从一个不成熟的年轻人变成了负责任的大人。
option_pinyin: suí zhe shí jiān de tuī yí

exercises.question: Choose the correct use of 随着时间的推移.
exercises.correct: 随着时间的推移，她对人生有了更深刻的理解。
options: 随着时间的推移，她对人生有了更深刻的理解。
她随着对人生，时间的推移有了更深刻的理解。
时间的推移随着，她对人生有了更深刻的理解。
她对人生更深刻，随着时间的推移理解了。
option_pinyin: Suí zhe shí jiān de tuī yí, tā duì rén shēng yǒu le gèng shēn kè de lǐ jiě.
Tā suí zhe duì rén shēng, shí jiān de tuī yí yǒu le gèng shēn kè de lǐ jiě.
Shí jiān de tuī yí suí zhe, tā duì rén shēng yǒu le gèng shēn kè de lǐ jiě.
Tā duì rén shēng gèng shēn kè, suí zhe shí jiān de tuī yí lǐ jiě le.

exercises.question: What does 随着时间的推移 mean?
exercises.correct: As time goes by; as time passes
options: As time goes by; as time passes

exercises.question: 随着时间的推移，童年的 _____ 会变得越来越珍贵。
Which sentence uses 随着时间的推移 correctly?
exercises.correct: 随着时间的推移，他慢慢忘记了那段经历。
options: 随着时间的推移，他慢慢忘记了那段经历。
他慢慢随着时间的推移忘记了那段经历。
他慢慢忘记了那段经历，随着时间的推移。
他随着时间的推移，慢慢忘记了的那段经历。

grammar_points.title: 曾经 — Once; used to
grammar_points.explanation: 曾经 is an adverb meaning 'once', 'formerly', or 'used to'. It is used to refer to something that happened in the past, often implying that the situation has since changed. Structure: Subject + 曾经 + verb phrase. It is placed before the verb. 我曾经住在北京 - I used to live in Beijing.

examples.chinese: 她曾经有过一段非常美好的童年，充满了快乐的回忆。
examples.pinyin: Tā céng jīng yǒu guò yí duàn fēi cháng měi hǎo de tóng nián, chōng mǎn le kuài lè de huí yì.
examples.english: She once had a very beautiful childhood, filled with happy memories.

examples.chinese: 他曾经是一名运动员，但随着时间的推移，他转行成了一名教练。
examples.pinyin: Tā céng jīng shì yì míng yùn dòng yuán, dàn suí zhe shí jiān de tuī yí, tā zhuǎn háng chéng le yì míng jiào liàn.
examples.english: He used to be an athlete, but as time went by, he changed careers and became a coach.

exercises.question: 我 _____ 以为青春会永远持续，但现在才明白时间的珍贵。
Choose the correct use of 曾经.
exercises.correct: 他曾经迷失过方向，但最终找到了人生目标。
options: 他曾经迷失过方向，但最终找到了人生目标。
他迷失过曾经方向，但最终找到了人生目标。
曾经他，迷失过方向但最终找到了人生目标。
迷失过方向他曾经，但最终找到了人生目标。
option_pinyin: Tā céng jīng mí shī guò fāng xiàng, dàn zuì zhōng zhǎo dào le rén shēng mù biāo.
Tā mí shī guò céng jīng fāng xiàng, dàn zuì zhōng zhǎo dào le rén shēng mù biāo.
Céng jīng tā, mí shī guò fāng xiàng dàn zuì zhōng zhǎo dào le rén shēng mù biāo.
Mí shī guò fāng xiàng tā céng jīng, dàn zuì zhōng zhǎo dào le rén shēng mù biāo.

exercises.question: 她 _____ 是一个内向的孩子，但随着成长变得越来越自信。
Which sentence uses 曾经 correctly?
exercises.correct: 他曾经住在北京，后来搬到上海了。
options: 他曾经住在北京，后来搬到上海了。
曾经他住在北京，后来搬到上海了。
他住曾经在北京，后来搬到上海了。
他住在北京曾经，后来搬到上海了。

grammar_points.title: 趁 — While; to take advantage of (a time or opportunity)
grammar_points.explanation: 趁 means 'while' or 'to take advantage of a favourable time or condition'. It introduces a time window that should be seized. Structure: 趁 + time/condition + (subject) + action. It urges the listener to act during a certain favourable period. 趁天气好，我们去爬山吧 - While the weather is good, let's go hiking.

examples.chinese: 趁年轻，要多积累经历，规划好自己的未来。
examples.pinyin: Chèn nián qīng, yào duō jī lěi jīng lì, guī huà hǎo zì jǐ de wèi lái.
examples.english: While you are young, accumulate more experiences and plan your future well.

examples.chinese: 趁父母还健康，多陪陪他们，珍惜在一起的时间。
examples.pinyin: Chèn fù mǔ hái jiàn kāng, duō péi pei tā men, zhēn xī zài yì qǐ de shí jiān.
examples.english: While your parents are still healthy, spend more time with them and cherish the time together.

exercises.question: _____ 还有机会，你应该好好规划自己的人生。
option_pinyin: suí zhe shí jiān de tuī yí

exercises.question: Choose the correct use of 趁.
exercises.correct: 趁现在还年轻，要珍惜每一个学习机会。
options: 趁现在还年轻，要珍惜每一个学习机会。
现在趁还年轻，要珍惜每一个学习机会。
要珍惜趁，现在还年轻每一个学习机会。
每一个趁学习机会，要珍惜现在还年轻。
option_pinyin: Chèn xiàn zài hái nián qīng, yào zhēn xī měi yí gè xué xí jī huì.
Xiàn zài chèn hái nián qīng, yào zhēn xī měi yí gè xué xí jī huì.
Yào zhēn xī chèn, xiàn zài hái nián qīng měi yí gè xué xí jī huì.
Měi yí gè chèn xué xí jī huì, yào zhēn xī xiàn zài hái nián qīng.

exercises.question: What does 趁 mean?
exercises.correct: While; to take advantage of a favourable time
options: While; to take advantage of a favourable time

exercises.question: 趁青春还在，_____ 好好经历人生的每个阶段。
趁 introduces which element in a sentence?
exercises.correct: A favourable time or condition to act in
options: A favourable time or condition to act in

culture_notes.title: Life Stages and Milestones in Chinese Culture
culture_notes.title_chinese: 中国文化中的人生阶段与里程碑
culture_notes.content: Chinese culture has traditionally placed great significance on the different stages of life (人生阶段, rén shēng jiē duàn). Important milestones include the 百日宴 (bǎi rì yàn), a celebration held 100 days after a baby is born, and the 抓周 (zhuā zhōu), a first-birthday ceremony where items are laid before the child to 'predict' their future career. Coming of age is marked at 18 and is increasingly celebrated publicly. Marriage and the birth of children are considered central life events, and many Chinese families place great importance on education from an early age, often guiding children to plan their futures (规划未来, guī huà wèi lái) carefully. The Confucian emphasis on filial piety (孝顺, xiào shùn) means that caring for ageing parents is seen as a fundamental duty across all life stages. Elders are honoured for their life experience and wisdom, and phrases such as 家有一老，如有一宝 (jiā yǒu yī lǎo, rú yǒu yī bǎo, 'Having an elder at home is like having a treasure') reflect this deep respect.

idioms.english: Time flies like an arrow — time passes very quickly

quiz.question: Fill in the blank: _____ ，她慢慢变得越来越成熟和独立。
What does 随着时间的推移 mean?
quiz.correct: As time goes by; as time passes
options: As time goes by; as time passes

quiz.question: Fill in the blank: 他 _____ 是一个很内向的孩子，但现在变得非常开朗。
Choose the correct use of 趁.
quiz.correct: 趁年轻，多积累经验和回忆。
options: 趁年轻，多积累经验和回忆。
年轻趁，多积累经验和回忆。
多积累经验趁，年轻和回忆。
回忆趁年轻，多积累经验和。

quiz.question: What does the phrase 规划未来 mean?
The idiom 光阴似箭 means:
quiz.correct: Time flies like an arrow — time passes very quickly
options: Time flies like an arrow — time passes very quickly
Childhood is the best time of life
The future is bright and hopeful
Each stage of life has its own value

quiz.question: Which grammar pattern means 'while; take advantage of a favourable time'?
Fill in: 童年和青春是人生中最美好的 _____，需要珍惜。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 伍尔夫，你有过什么难忘的童年回忆吗？
lines.pinyin: Wǔ Ěr Fū, nǐ yǒu guò shén me nán wàng de tóng nián huí yì ma?
lines.english: Woolf, do you have any unforgettable childhood memories?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 当然有！我小时候曾经每年暑假都去外婆家，那是我人生中最美好的阶段。
lines.pinyin: Dāng rán yǒu! Wǒ xiǎo shí hou céng jīng měi nián shǔ jià dōu qù wài pó jiā, nà shì wǒ rén shēng zhōng zuì měi hǎo de jiē duàn.
lines.english: Of course! When I was little, I used to go to my grandmother's house every summer holiday; that was the most beautiful stage of my life.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 听起来很美好！随着时间的推移，那些经历对你现在有什么影响吗？
lines.pinyin: Tīng qǐ lái hěn měi hǎo! Suí zhe shí jiān de tuī yí, nà xiē jīng lì duì nǐ xiàn zài yǒu shén me yǐng xiǎng ma?
lines.english: That sounds wonderful! As time has gone by, have those experiences had any influence on you now?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 有的！那些经历让我更加珍惜家人之间的相处时光，也让我学会了珍惜每一个机会。
lines.pinyin: Yǒu de! Nà xiē jīng lì ràng wǒ gèng jiā zhēn xī jiā rén zhī jiān de xiāng chǔ shí guāng, yě ràng wǒ xué huì le zhēn xī měi yí gè jī huì.
lines.english: Yes! Those experiences made me cherish family time even more, and taught me to cherish every opportunity.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你说得对。趁现在还年轻，我们也要好好规划未来，不要浪费青春。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì. Chèn xiàn zài hái nián qīng, wǒ men yě yào hǎo hǎo guī huà wèi lái, bú yào làng fèi qīng chūn.
lines.english: You're right. While we are still young, we should also plan our future well and not waste our youth.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 没错！随着时间的推移，我们会越来越成熟，也会有更多宝贵的成长经历。
lines.pinyin: Méi cuò! Suí zhe shí jiān de tuī yí, wǒ men huì yuè lái yuè chéng shú, yě huì yǒu gèng duō bǎo guì de chéng zhǎng jīng lì.
lines.english: Exactly! As time goes by, we will become more and more mature and will have even more precious growing-up experiences.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 人生的每个阶段都有它的意义，我们要好好珍惜。
lines.pinyin: Rén shēng de měi gè jiē duàn dōu yǒu tā de yì yì, wǒ men yào hǎo hǎo zhēn xī.
lines.english: Each stage of life has its own significance; we must cherish them all.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 爸爸，我曾经以为大学会很轻松，但现在才发现压力很大。
lines.pinyin: Bà ba, wǒ céng jīng yǐ wéi dà xué huì hěn qīng sōng, dàn xiàn zài cái fā xiàn yā lì hěn dà.
lines.english: Dad, I used to think university would be very relaxed, but now I realise there is a lot of pressure.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 这是很正常的，成长就是这样，每个人生阶段都有不同的挑战。
lines.pinyin: Zhè shì hěn zhèng cháng de, chéng zhǎng jiù shì zhè yàng, měi gè rén shēng jiē duàn dōu yǒu bù tóng de tiǎo zhàn.
lines.english: That's very normal; growing up is like that — each stage of life brings different challenges.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 但我不知道应该怎么规划自己的未来，有时候感到很迷茫。
lines.pinyin: Dàn wǒ bù zhī dào yīng gāi zěn me guī huà zì jǐ de wèi lái, yǒu shí hou gǎn dào hěn mí máng.
lines.english: But I don't know how to plan my future; sometimes I feel very lost.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 趁现在还有时间，多探索自己的兴趣，不要害怕经历不同的事情。
lines.pinyin: Chèn xiàn zài hái yǒu shí jiān, duō tàn suǒ zì jǐ de xìng qù, bú yào hài pà jīng lì bù tóng de shì qing.
lines.english: While there is still time, explore your interests more and don't be afraid to experience different things.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 爸爸，你曾经有过这样的迷茫感吗？
lines.pinyin: Bà ba, nǐ céng jīng yǒu guò zhè yàng de mí máng gǎn ma?
lines.english: Dad, did you ever feel this sense of confusion?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 当然有过！但随着时间的推移，你会慢慢找到自己的方向，只要珍惜每一个机会就好。
lines.pinyin: Dāng rán yǒu guò! Dàn suí zhe shí jiān de tuī yí, nǐ huì màn màn zhǎo dào zì jǐ de fāng xiàng, zhǐ yào zhēn xī měi yí gè jī huì jiù hǎo.
lines.english: Of course! But as time goes by, you'll gradually find your direction — just cherish every opportunity.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 谢谢爸爸！我会好好珍惜青春，认真规划未来的。
lines.pinyin: Xiè xie bà ba! Wǒ huì hǎo hǎo zhēn xī qīng chūn, rèn zhēn guī huà wèi lái de.
lines.english: Thank you, Dad! I will cherish my youth and plan my future seriously.
